summary: Frontend e2e verification of three Electron-era UI regressions in browser. All three fixes verified: (1) typing into NewProjectDialog Name + Description inputs works character-for-character; (2) per-row delete-transaction triggers custom React ConfirmDialog (not browser confirm) and removes the row; (3) delete-project menu triggers custom ConfirmDialog and removes the project. Live API smoke (POST /api/projects, POST /api/transactions/upload, DELETE /api/transactions/{id}, DELETE /api/projects/{id}, GET /api/projects) all returned expected statuses through the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. 10/10 frontend checks passed.

issues: Recharts console warning: container width(-1) and height(-1) — chart container has 0/undefined dimensions on initial render. Cosmetic only, no visible breakage.

critical_code_review_comments: NewProjectDialog correctly uses uncontrolled refs + onOpenAutoFocus preventDefault — verified working in browser.
ConfirmProvider is a clean promise-based API; useConfirm() safe-default returns false when provider missing (good).
Layout.handleDelete + Transactions.remove/bulkDelete all correctly await confirm() before destructive calls — no window.confirm references remain in these flows.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Created project E2E_VerifyProject_<ts>, uploaded 3-row CSV, then deleted both transactions and project as part of teardown — environment is clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three Electron regressions are fixed in browser. data-testids in use: header-new-project-btn, new-project-name-input, new-project-desc-input, submit-new-project-btn, project-switcher, project-option-{id}, new-project-menu, delete-project-menu, nav-transactions, transactions-table, delete-tx-btn-{id}, confirm-dialog, confirm-ok-btn, confirm-cancel-btn. Backend public URL is REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env.
rca of the issue: Not applicable — verification run, no bugs found. Original Electron regressions root-cause was: (a) controlled inputs inside Radix Dialog losing focus per keystroke in packaged Electron (fix: uncontrolled refs + defaultValue + onOpenAutoFocus preventDefault), (b) window.confirm returns undefined in packaged Electron silently breaking delete actions (fix: ConfirmProvider/useConfirm promise-based custom Radix Dialog modal). Both fixes are intact and working.
